features: Festive Designs: This set of pens for kids features adorable Christmas-themed designs including a snowman, Santa Claus, and a reindeer, each uniquely crafted to add a touch of holiday cheer to your writing experience.

Smooth Writing: Equipped with 1.0mm bullet tips, these christmas pen offer a smooth and consistent writing experience. They are suitable for everyday use at home, school, or the office, ensuring comfort and precision.

Holiday Spirit: Perfect for Christmas enthusiasts, these novelty pens are not only functional but also serve as delightful seasonal decorations for your workspace or as gifts that embody the spirit of the holidays.

Lightweight and Portable: Made from lightweight materials, these boxing pen are easy to carry around in your bag, pocket, or pencil case. Their ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip for extended writing sessions.

Gift Ready: Packaged beautifully, these novelty pens for kids make an ideal gift for friends, family, or colleagues during the festive season. Whether used for writing cards, journaling, or simply doodling, they bring joy and festivity to any writing task.
description: Specifications: Material: Plastic Color: As shown in the picture Size: 19 cm Quantity: 3 pcs Versatile and practical, this Christmas pen will meet all your writing needs. Use it for school, work, journaling, scrapbooking, or just to add a touch of color to your daily tasks. Let your creativity run free and make every word stand out! Celebrate Christmas in style with our charming set of three Christmas Ballpoint Pens, designed to bring a smile to your face with every stroke.
